actual.review_text:
Սիրելի հայրենակիցներ,

եթե դեռ ծանոթ չեք SASTIC նախաձեռնությանը և դրա նպատակներին, կարող եք շատ կարճ ժամանակում ծանոթանալ այստեղ․ 

Յուրաքանչյուր անհատի օգնությունը շատ կարևոր է այս գործին ավելի մեծ ընթացք տալու և ծրագրերն ավելի էֆեկտիվ իրագործելու համար։ Կարող եք օժանդակել թե ֆինանսապես, և թե ձեր մասնագիտական հմտություններով։

Եթե կասկածներ ունեք ծրագրերի, կամ ընդհանրապես նախաձեռնության վերաբերյալ, SASTIC-ի անդամները մեծ հաճույքով կպատասխանեն ձեր հարցերին․ ։

Հուսով եմ՝ պատերազմի օրերին արտահայտված համախմբվածությունը և հայրենիքի զարգացմանն ուղղված գործունեությունը գոնե որոշ չափով կարտահայտվի նաև այստեղ։

Շնորհակալություն ուշադրության համար

#sastic

prediction.review_text:
Centralized customer payments in ERP systems can significantly streamline financial operations and enhance cash flow management. 💰

As I've worked with SAP S/4HANA, I've seen firsthand how effective integration of centralized payments can reduce discrepancies and improve reporting accuracy. If you're navigating this landscape, I recommend diving into the configuration of the Material Ledger and ensuring your MM-FI integration is robust. 

For those looking for resources, I’ve compiled some step-by-step guides and best practices on my SlideShare. Let’s make ERP systems work smarter for us! #SAP #S4HANA #Finance #ERP #Integration

actual.review_text:
Centralized Customer Payments for Headquarters and Subsidiaries by Komathi T SAP Labs India 

Welcome to the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Two-tier ERP blog series. 

In this blog, let’s look at centralized customer payments in a Two-tier deployment model.

S/4HANA customer payments is a public cloud solution delivered in the SAP Cloud Platform, which provides a self-service offering to enable our customers to deploy electronic bill presentment and payment processes. In this Two-tier scenario, where headquarters is running On-Premise (ECC6+ or S/4HANA On-premise) and the subsidiary is running on S/4HANA cloud, SAP S/4HANA cloud for customer payment serves as a centralized customer payment solution for both headquarter as well as subsidiary.

While running in such two-tier landscape, processing repetitive customer inquiries regarding invoice copies, underpayment, dispute cases, matching incoming payments with open items because of Time zone issues, Language barriers, Large numbers of documents would be a great challenge to the accounts team.

Check out the full blog here

deltas.product_description: Centralized customer payments in ERP systems

prediction.review_text: Exciting news for those in the autonomous vehicle space! 🚗💡 Open source datasets are now available to accelerate development and innovation in this field. These datasets not only enhance the training of machine learning models but also foster collaboration within our community. As we integrate AI and technology, it's crucial to share resources that empower developers and researchers alike. Let's leverage these tools to push the boundaries of what's possible in autonomous systems! What projects are you working on that could benefit from these datasets? #AI #OpenSource #AutonomousVehicles #MachineLearning

actual.review_text:
Wow , Lyft just open sourced its autonomous driving dataset from its Level 5 self-driving fleet!

Awesome stuff, Logan Green & team 

Download their Level 5 dataset: 
___________________________________________________
For reference, the Lyft Level 5 Dataset includes:
1) Over 55,000 human-labeled 3D annotated frames;
2) Data from 7 cameras and up to 3 lidars;
3) A drivable surface map; and,
4) An underlying HD spatial semantic map (including lanes, crosswalks, etc.)
___________________________________________________

#selfdriving #autonomousvehicles #deeplearning

deltas.product_description: Open source datasets for autonomous vehicle development

prediction.review_text:
As we continue to explore the transformative impact of AI on healthcare diagnostics and research, I'm reminded of the incredible potential we have to enhance patient outcomes through technology. At Microsoft, we’re leveraging Azure's robust capabilities to support AI-driven solutions that not only streamline processes but also provide deeper insights into patient care. 

It's exciting to see how AI can assist in identifying patterns that humans might miss, ultimately leading to earlier diagnoses and more personalized treatment plans. 

I encourage my fellow tech professionals to think about how we can further integrate these innovations responsibly, ensuring that we prioritize security and patient privacy in our solutions. Let's keep pushing the boundaries of what's possible together! 

#AI #Healthcare #Azure #Innovation

actual.review_text:
Not many of you may know but I spent a lot of my career in the pathology laboratories doing software engineering.

I have often thought how AI will revolutionize patient care, especially in terms of diagnostic services such as radiology and pathology. So it was exciting to see new research from my current employer Microsoft and my former, the UW, rolling research into exactly this, using AI to improve cancer outcomes.

Thinking of the good old days when Rodney Schmidt and I were trying "change the world" with software!

deltas.product_description: AI impact on healthcare diagnostics and research

prediction.review_text: Exciting times ahead as we continue to push the boundaries of networking products within our cloud services! 🚀 I'm thrilled to see our teams collaborating on innovative solutions that enhance Azure's capabilities, particularly in areas like the Azure Virtual Network Manager and routing optimization. These advancements not only simplify operational complexity but also prioritize security and performance at scale. A huge shoutout to my colleagues for their hard work and dedication in making these features a reality. Let's keep driving forward together! #Azure #CloudNetworking #Innovation

actual.review_text:
I love how Simona shows us that two great products can be used together to really give you an amazing networking experience in Azure. 

I have been working a lot lately with my counterparts in vWAN and learning more about their offerings. Together we are looking how we can bring even more great capabilities to our customers.

deltas.product_description: Collaborative advancements in networking products within cloud services

Յուրաքանչյուր անհատի օգնությունը շատ կարևոր է այս գործին ավելի մեծ ընթացք տալու և ծրագրերն ավելի էֆեկտիվ իրագործելու համար։ Կարող եք օժանդակել թե ֆինանսապես, և թե ձեր մասնագիտական հմտություններով։

Եթե կասկածներ ունեք ծրագրերի, կամ ընդհանրապես նախաձեռնության վերաբերյալ, SASTIC-ի անդամները մեծ հաճույքով կպատասխանեն ձեր հարցերին․ ։

Հուսով եմ՝ պատերազմի օրերին արտահայտված համախմբվածությունը և հայրենիքի զարգացմանն ուղղված գործունեությունը գոնե որոշ չափով կարտահայտվի նաև այստեղ։

Շնորհակալություն ուշադրության համար

#sastic

deltas.product_description: Community initiatives and assistance programs

prediction.review_text:
Centralized customer payments in SAP S/4HANA can significantly enhance our financial operations. 🌟 

From my experience, a well-configured Material Ledger, paired with effective MM-FI integration, not only improves reporting accuracy but also minimizes discrepancies, leading to a smoother financial process overall. 

I invite my fellow SAP professionals to explore these configurations! I've created detailed step-by-step guides on my SlideShare that can help you navigate these complexities. Let's work together to elevate our ERP systems from basic functionality to exceptional efficiency! #SAP #S4HANA #Finance #ERP #Integration

actual.review_text:
Centralized Customer Payments for Headquarters and Subsidiaries by Komathi T SAP Labs India 

Welcome to the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Two-tier ERP blog series. 

In this blog, let’s look at centralized customer payments in a Two-tier deployment model.

S/4HANA customer payments is a public cloud solution delivered in the SAP Cloud Platform, which provides a self-service offering to enable our customers to deploy electronic bill presentment and payment processes. In this Two-tier scenario, where headquarters is running On-Premise (ECC6+ or S/4HANA On-premise) and the subsidiary is running on S/4HANA cloud, SAP S/4HANA cloud for customer payment serves as a centralized customer payment solution for both headquarter as well as subsidiary.

While running in such two-tier landscape, processing repetitive customer inquiries regarding invoice copies, underpayment, dispute cases, matching incoming payments with open items because of Time zone issues, Language barriers, Large numbers of documents would be a great challenge to the accounts team.

Check out the full blog here

deltas.product_description: Centralized customer payments in ERP systems

Awesome stuff, Logan Green & team

For reference, the Lyft Level 5 Dataset includes:

Սիրելի հայրենակիցներ,

եթե դեռ ծանոթ չեք SASTIC նախաձեռնությանը և դրա նպատակներին, կարող եք շատ կարճ ժամանակում ծանոթանալ այստեղ․ 

Յուրաքանչյուր անհատի օգնությունը շատ կարևոր է այս գործին ավելի մեծ ընթացք տալու և ծրագրերն ավելի էֆեկտիվ իրագործելու համար։ Կարող եք օժանդակել թե ֆինանսապես, և թե ձեր մասնագիտական հմտություններով։

Եթե կասկածներ ունեք ծրագրերի, կամ ընդհանրապես նախաձեռնության վերաբերյալ, SASTIC-ի անդամները մեծ հաճույքով կպատասխանեն ձեր հարցերին․ ։

Հուսով եմ՝ պատերազմի օրերին արտահայտված համախմբվածությունը և հայրենիքի զարգացմանն ուղղված գործունեությունը գոնե որոշ չափով կարտահայտվի նաև այստեղ։

Շնորհակալություն ուշադրության համար

#sastic

prediction.review_text: As we continue to innovate within our cloud services, I'm excited about the collaborative advancements we're making in networking products! 🚀 The work on the Azure Virtual Network Manager and routing optimization is a testament to our team's dedication to building systems that not only enhance operational efficiency but also prioritize security and performance at scale. It's crucial that we focus on creating adaptive solutions that meet our customers' evolving needs. A heartfelt thank you to my colleagues for their hard work and commitment to excellence. Let's keep pushing the boundaries together! #Azure #CloudNetworking #Innovation #Collaboration

actual.review_text:
I love how Simona shows us that two great products can be used together to really give you an amazing networking experience in Azure. 

I have been working a lot lately with my counterparts in vWAN and learning more about their offerings. Together we are looking how we can bring even more great capabilities to our customers.

deltas.product_description: Collaborative advancements in networking products within cloud services

prediction.review_text:
As I reflect on the transformative potential of AI in healthcare diagnostics, I am continually inspired by the advancements we are making at Microsoft. Our work with Azure is not just about technology; it's about enhancing patient outcomes and making a real difference in people's lives. 

AI's ability to identify patterns that may elude human eyes is revolutionary, paving the way for earlier diagnoses and tailored treatment plans. This is a pivotal moment for our industry, and I urge my fellow tech professionals to engage in responsible innovation. 

We must prioritize security and patient privacy as we integrate these powerful tools into healthcare systems. Together, let's push the boundaries of what's possible and ensure that our technological advancements serve the greater good. 

#AI #Healthcare #Azure #Innovation #PatientCare

actual.review_text:
Not many of you may know but I spent a lot of my career in the pathology laboratories doing software engineering.

I have often thought how AI will revolutionize patient care, especially in terms of diagnostic services such as radiology and pathology. So it was exciting to see new research from my current employer Microsoft and my former, the UW, rolling research into exactly this, using AI to improve cancer outcomes.

Thinking of the good old days when Rodney Schmidt and I were trying "change the world" with software!

deltas.product_description: AI impact on healthcare diagnostics and research

prediction.review_text: As I reflect on my journey in cybersecurity, I recognize the importance of mental health during career transitions. 🌟 It's a field that demands resilience, especially in challenging times like layoffs. I've faced impostor syndrome myself, and it's crucial to remind ourselves that we're not alone in these feelings. Mentorship has been a guiding light for me, providing support and perspective when I needed it most. If you're considering a career in cybersecurity, know that there are incredible opportunities waiting for you at Microsoft. Let's uplift each other and build a community that values mental well-being as much as technical expertise. Together, we can navigate these transitions and create a safer digital world! 💪 #Cybersecurity #MentalHealth #CareerTransitions #Microsoft #Mentorship
